title: phalangium japonicum
intro: Phalangium japonicum, also known as the Japanese spiderwort or Houttuynia cordata, is a type of aquatic herb native to East Asia. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Phalangium japonicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Phalangium japonicum typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
